steps.t: Haerondir can be found to the south of Ondoher's Folly in Dagorlad. You have learned much from the spirit of Faramir and should now deliver a warning …
Laeglaw can be found in Haerondir. You have returned to Haerondir and have been spotted by Laeglaw and Mincham. You should speak to Laeglaw.
Anborn can be found at Haerondir. You have returned to Haerondir too late, and now Laeglaw fears Anborn has sent his men on a foolish errand. You shou…
